changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-entity/src/store.rs:33-38 and swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs:43

EntityTypeStore is a public struct (re-exported from lib.rs line 43) but does not derive or implement Debug. Per Rust review guidelines, all public types should implement Debug. The struct contains PathBuf, String, Arc<EntityDef>, and Arc<Vec<FieldDef>> -- all of which are Debug, so a derive would work.

Suggestion: Add `#[derive(Debug)]` to the EntityTypeStore struct definition. Severity: nit.
store.rs: EntityTypeStore not re-exported with Debug impl -- public type missing Debug
